data_gap_note: mfe/mae columns added 2026-04-22 (state_db.py:208). Historical v5.1 trades that closed before that date have NULL mfe/mae and are excluded. Process restarts between open and close will also produce NULLs. Going-forward trades will populate these once a full open→close cycle runs without restart.

give_back_pct.interpretation: give_back = MFE - final_pnl_pct. High p90 give_back means trailing is leaving meaningful profit on the table. Low give_back means trailing is catching peaks tightly.
